rulings.Case Title: RALPH F. JOHNSON VS. NATALIE SANTIAGO AKA NATALIE SANTIAGO ORTIZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 11, 2012, line 4. Plaintiff Ralph Johnson's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery, to Establish Admissions. Granted. No opposition filed. 1) Defendant to provide responses to Special and Form Interrogatories and Request for Production by 1-13-12. 2) Requests for admissions denied. Sanctions awarded in the amount fo $400. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT NAVARRO VS. CHARITY WHITE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Response To Disco, To Establish Admissions And Req For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 11, 2012, line 5. Plaintiff Robert Navarro's Motion to Compel Response to Discovery, To Establish Admissions and Request for Sanctions. Deny, without prejudice as to compelling responses. Grant sanctions in the amount of $400.00. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
